meaning: n.(=lotus)[希神]忘忧树或其果实,[植]莲属植物,埃及白睡莲
examples: Realization of LOTOS formal specification is one of indispensable steps in protocol design.
The theory basis of GTSL is the theory of grey system and that of LOTOS, the language of temporal ordering specification.
LOTOS is a specification language that aims at describing the dynamic behavior of complex systems (formal description language).
PKN's smaller domestic rival, Grupa Lotos, to Lukoil, a Russian oil group.
